data.name: Mos Eisley Cantina
data.description: A bustling cantina on Tatooine where smugglers and bounty hunters gather

data.name: Kuat Drive Yards
data.description: A massive starship manufacturing facility orbiting Kuat

data.name: Cloud City Mining
data.description: A tibanna gas mining operation on Bespin

data.name: Jedi Temple Archives
data.description: A repository of Jedi knowledge on Coruscant

data.name: Death Star Construction
data.description: A secretive imperial project in deep space

data.name: Hoth Rebel Base
data.description: A hidden rebel outpost in the frozen wastes

data.name: Geonosian Foundry
data.description: A droid manufacturing facility on Geonosis

data.name: Mandalorian Forge
data.description: A beskar forging facility on Mandalore

data.name: Bartend
data.success_message: You served drinks to rowdy patrons and earned good tips!
data.failure_message: A bounty hunter started a fight - you lost money in the chaos.

data.name: Smuggle Spice
data.success_message: You successfully smuggled spice past the Imperial patrol!
data.failure_message: Imperial forces caught you - your cargo is confiscated.

data.name: Assemble Starship
data.success_message: You successfully assembled a starship component - quality work!
data.failure_message: A critical part failed during assembly - damage costs deducted.

data.name: Design Prototype
data.success_message: Your prototype design was approved for production!
data.failure_message: The prototype failed stress tests - materials wasted.

data.name: Extract Tibanna Gas
data.success_message: You safely extracted valuable tibanna gas!
data.failure_message: A gas leak caused an explosion - medical bills deducted.

data.name: Negotiate Contract
data.success_message: You secured a lucrative contract for Cloud City!
data.failure_message: The negotiations fell through - wasted time.

data.name: Restore Holocron
data.success_message: You restored an ancient Jedi holocron - the Archives are grateful!
data.failure_message: You accidentally corrupted the holocron data.

data.name: Research Force Lore
data.failure_message: The texts were encrypted beyond your ability to decipher.

data.name: Install Superlaser
data.success_message: You made progress installing the superlaser array!
data.failure_message: You caused a critical delay - Imperial penalties applied.

data.name: Steal Schematics
data.success_message: You escaped with the Death Star schematics!
data.failure_message: You were captured and interrogated - all assets seized.

data.name: Fortify Defenses
data.success_message: You reinforced the base's defenses against Imperial attack!
data.failure_message: An avalanche destroyed your work - materials lost.

data.name: Scout Imperial Movements
data.success_message: Your intelligence helped the Alliance prepare!
data.failure_message: Your scouting party was ambushed by snowtroopers.

data.name: Assemble Droid
data.success_message: A new B1 battle droid rolls off the assembly line!

data.name: Design New Droid
data.success_message: Your new droid design enters mass production!

data.name: Forge Beskar
data.success_message: You successfully forged pure beskar armor!

data.name: Hunt Bounty
data.success_message: You captured the bounty - the Guild pays well!
data.failure_message: Your target escaped after a brutal gunfight.
